clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/async_http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/http_parser/http_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/http_parser/http_request_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/http_parser/http_response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/http_parser/http_response_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/error_handlers/error_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/error_handlers/error_handler_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/matchers/path_matcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/matchers/variable_matcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/multiplexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/route_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/config/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/asynchronous_http_server1.dir/src/config/config_provider.cpp.o -o /Users/ider/Desktop/Programs/File-Host/server/bin/asynchronous_http_server1  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_coroutine.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_regex.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_date_time.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_json.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libyaml-cpp.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_context.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/boost/1.90.0/lib/libboost_container.dylib
